title: Kasha
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:CereanArtifact.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Cerean holding a Kasha crystal]]
The '''kasha''' was a crystal traditionally used by the [[Cerean/Legends|Cereans]] as a meditation tool. They were used to clear the mind of distractions in order to create a perfect meditation environment. Patterns were scribed on each face of the crystal to harness its full energy potential, possibly created by [[Bi-Dar Tyunda]] thousands of years before.

When used as a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]], it helped clear the wielder's mind of distractions, even during tense combat.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
*{{GalaxiesNGE}}
